heading: Exemption of non-profit institutions from price discrimination provisions
label: 13c Exemption of non-profit institutions from price discrimination provisions
text: Nothing in the Act approved , known as the Robinson-Patman Antidiscrimination Act, shall apply to purchases of their supplies for their own use by schools, colleges, universities, public libraries, churches, hospitals, and charitable institutions not operated for profit.June 19, 1936
notes: References in TextThe Act approved , known as the Robinson-Patman Antidiscrimination Act, referred to in text, is , , also known as the Robinson-Patman Price Discrimination Act, which enacted sections 13a, 13b, and 21a of this title and amended . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.June 19, 1936act June 19, 1936, ch. 59249 Stat. 1526section 13 of this titlesection 13 of this title
